findings.message: PII field 'owner_email' exposed in external API response. The database model explicitly marks this field as 'PII: owner email address — do not include in logs or external responses' (models.py:16), but ItemRead schema includes it in the response contract, violating this requirement. Both GET and POST endpoints will expose this PII to all API clients.
findings.suggestion: Remove 'owner_email' from the ItemRead response schema. Create a separate internal schema (e.g., ItemReadInternal) if owner_email needs to be used internally, but the public API contract should not expose PII fields.
